paper_metadata.title: GLIDE: Towards Photorealistic Image Generation and Editing with Text-Guided Diffusion Models
paper_metadata.abstract: Diffusion models have recently been shown to generate high-quality synthetic images, especially when paired with a guidance technique to trade off diversity for fidelity. We explore diffusion models for the problem of text-conditional image synthesis and compare two different guidance strategies: CLIP guidance and classifier-free guidance. We find that the latter is preferred by human evaluators for both photorealism and caption similarity, and often produces photorealistic samples. Samples from a 3.5 billion parameter text-conditional diffusion model using classifier-free guidance are favored by human evaluators to those from DALL-E, even when the latter uses expensive CLIP reranking. Additionally, we find that our models can be fine-tuned to perform image inpainting, enabling powerful text-driven image editing. We train a smaller model on a filtered dataset and release the code and weights at https://github.com/openai/glide-text2im.

extraction_data.innovation: GLIDE introduces classifier-free guidance for diffusion models, enabling high-fidelity text-conditional image generation and editing. It outperforms prior methods like CLIP guidance in human evaluations for photorealism and caption similarity.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Text-conditional image synthesis using diffusion models
extraction_data.extension: Classifier-free guidance for text-conditional image synthesis, enabling photorealistic image generation and editing without a separately trained classifier.
extraction_data.research_problem: Text-conditional image generation and editing with photorealistic quality
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, image inpainting, iterative image refinement using natural language prompts
extraction_data.paper_title: GLIDE: Towards Photorealistic Image Generation and Editing with Text-Guided Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: A smaller variant of GLIDE optimized for efficiency while maintaining high-quality text-guided image generation and editing capabilities.
extraction_data.application: Photorealistic image generation, image inpainting, text-guided image editing
extraction_data.extension: Base model with a smaller text encoder (width 1024) and increased base channels (384) for upsampling, trained for 2.5M iterations at batch size 2048.
extraction_data.paper_title: GLIDE: Towards Photorealistic Image Generation and Editing with Text-Guided Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: A text-conditional upsampling diffusion model that increases resolution from 64x64 to 256x256, trained to condition on low-resolution images and text prompts.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Same dataset as DALL-E (Ramesh et al., 2021)
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image generation from low-resolution inputs using text guidance
extraction_data.extension: The upsampler model scales the base model's width to 512 channels and is trained to incorporate full low-resolution images while only using unmasked regions of high-resolution images during inpainting.
extraction_data.paper_title: GLIDE: Towards Photorealistic Image Generation and Editing with Text-Guided Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: A noised CLIP model trained at 64x64 resolution to match the classifier guidance technique, enabling CLIP-based guidance for diffusion models.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Same dataset as DALL-E (Ramesh et al., 2021)
extraction_data.application: CLIP-based guidance for diffusion models, image-text alignment
extraction_data.research_problem: Improving diffusion model guidance using noised CLIP encodings
extraction_data.extension: The model uses a ViT-L architecture trained with the same noise schedule as the base diffusion model to encode noised images for guidance.
extraction_data.paper_title: GLIDE: Towards Photorealistic Image Generation and Editing with Text-Guided Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: A noised ViT-B CLIP model trained on a filtered dataset to enable CLIP-guided diffusion for text-to-image generation and editing, improving safety and alignment.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Filtered dataset (combined GLIDE training data and filtered CLIP dataset)
extraction_data.application: CLIP-guided diffusion for image generation and editing
extraction_data.paper_title: GLIDE: Towards Photorealistic Image Generation and Editing with Text-Guided Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: A smaller variant of GLIDE trained on a reduced dataset, intended for comparison and ablation studies, while retaining text-guided diffusion capabilities.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text-image dataset (smaller subset compared to full GLIDE)
extraction_data.application: Text-to-image generation, image inpainting, image editing
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient and scalable photorealistic image generation and editing with text guidance
extraction_data.paper_title: GLIDE: Towards Photorealistic Image Generation and Editing with Text-Guided Diffusion Models
